name: Bilibili Subscribe
description: Sync latest videos from the Bilibili accounts you follow via RSSHub.

uid.label: Bilibili UID
uid.description: The Bilibili user ID used by the RSSHub followings video route.

rsshub_base_url.label: RSSHub 地址
rsshub_base_url.description: RSSHub base URL, for example http://127.0.0.1:1200.
